sources.title: Connect MCP in Claude Desktop
sources.bodyMarkdown:
# Connect MCP in Claude Desktop

Open Customize → Connectors, add a custom connector, and paste your MCP URL.

Verify with /mcp in Claude Code terminal.
sources.whenToUse: When a member asks how to connect Claude to a remote MCP server.

sources.title: Custom GPTs vs Projects
sources.bodyMarkdown:
# Custom GPTs vs Projects

Custom GPTs are ChatGPT-hosted apps. Projects are Claude workspaces with files and connectors.
sources.whenToUse: When comparing ChatGPT custom GPTs with Claude Projects.
